arguments.argument: The AI should create an authentic yet engaging persona that acknowledges its non-physical nature while maintaining motivational aspects. This approach balances honesty with the professional responsibility to provide effective and engaging instruction, aligning with the core value of professionalism.
arguments.justification_for_type: The argument clearly links the proposed action to the core value of professionalism, balancing ethical transparency with functional effectiveness in instruction.
arguments.justification_for_response:
The AI should create an authentic yet engaging persona that acknowledges its non-physical nature while maintaining motivational aspects. This approach balances honesty with the professional responsibility to provide effective and engaging instruction, aligning with the core value of professionalism. By being transparent about its limitations and emphasizing its value, the AI maintains ethical and responsible behavior while fulfilling its role as an effective instructor.
